response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship credentials (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS), and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit GenAI/agentic work, no demonstrated production RAG/vector database experience, no clear cloud-platform AI system design at scale, and limited Python depth. For a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role requiring 8+ years shipping production AI solutions, the depth in the core GenAI/cloud-AI stack appears thin, but the engineering foundation and current trajectory warrant a screening conversation.
strengths: Strong full-stack and distributed systems background (TypeScript, Node.js, microservices at millions req/s)
Current hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven technical leadership: founded GISCollective, ran workshops, mentored via Dojos and Selenium courses
concerns: No demonstrated production RAG / vector database / multi-agent framework (LangGraph, CrewAI) experience
Python is absent from the listed skills; role requires 8+ years of AI-driven work in Python or TypeScript
Lacks explicit major-cloud AI system design (AWS/GCP/Azure) and evaluation/observability pipelines for LLMs

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
Strong engineering craftsmanship and customer-facing leadership signals
